snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Trumpet & Flugelhorn - Rakesh MS
Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:
Writer - Director: Srikanth Odela
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Chief Co-Director & Additional Screenplay: Vinay Sagar Jonnala
Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .
Color By: Redchillies.Color
Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy Carvaan, visit https://www.saregama.com/carvaan/telugu
To buy virus free original tracks, visit  https://www.saregama.com/musicstore

Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamatelugu
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

Dhurandhar 2 Ranveer Singh Controversy vs Dhurandhar Sequel Hype will promote the film like never before & Dhurandhar 2 Music Songs will take the Hype to next level. snippet.title: The Kerala Story 2 पर क्या चल रहा बवाल? | RJ Raunac
snippet.description:
------------------------
The Kerala Story 2 trailer has reignited a nationwide debate on cinema, society, and ideology. Is the film exposing uncomfortable truths about forced conversions and exploitation, or is it a politically motivated propaganda piece that fuels social division? From strong reactions by Kerala’s political leadership and filmmakers to references of court cases and historical records, this video breaks down who said what, what the ground reality suggests, and why this controversy refuses to die. A deep dive into cinema as a mirror of society — or a weapon in ideological battles.
---------------------------------
The Raunac Podcast with Maa Gambhiri on Life, Success, Sadhguru, Meditation, Allegations, Spirituality, GenZ & More :- https://youtu.be/NwIAJLb7Bhw

-------------
Watch
The Raunac Podcast with  Avadh Ojha :- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yYXx0p5FotM

Watch The Raunac Podcast : http://www.youtube.com/@TheRaunacPodcast-fz1px

Watch  VIRAL बात RAUNAC के साथ :- https://youtu.be/Q5SsJbhnBxI
--------------

Watch The Raunac Podcast with
Ashok Kumar Mittal on Business vs Politics :-https://youtu.be/KNW12uI9fPM
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Watch The Raunac Podcast with Aakash Chopra : https://youtu.be/7nBvBYZwf8A

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood#hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

#pyarbharegeet​​

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Trailer | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh, Saurabh Shukla
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 | Semi Finals Decider Day | #godlike #gdr #rntx #orangutan  #8bit
snippet.description:
Welcome to WELTIFY PRO CLASH SEASON 2 (WPCS2) — one of India’s biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

🏆 STAGE: Semi Finals – Decider Day
📅 DATE: 25th February 2026
⏰ TIME: 5:00 PM onwards
📍 FORMAT: Online

MATCH MAP ORDER
🔹 A x B Erangel
🔹A x B Miramar
🔹A x C Erangel
🔹A x C Miramar
🔹B x C Erangel
🔹B x C Miramar

GROUP A
Hero Xtreme GodLike, Victores Sumus, NoNx Esports, Vasista Esports, Welt Esports, White Walkers, Team Alpha, Riotnationz
GROUP B
iQOO Revenant X Spark, iQOO 8Bit, Genesis Esports, Team LEFP, Vanguard Esports, LHS Esports, EMZ Esports, Myth Esports
GROUP C
iQOO Orangutan, OnePlus Gods Reign, Meta Ninza, 4TR Official, Rising Esports, Team H4K, AutoBotz Esports, Gods 4 Reason

Welt Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Specializing in titles such as Bgmi,Clash Royale,Free Fire,Valorant and Fortnite, our teams are known for their tactical precision, relentless grind, and dynamic playstyles. We focus not only on winning, but on creating a culture where players can thrive—both in and out of the game.

Welt Esports is more than just a team; it's a movement. Our organization is built on the belief that esports is a legitimate and powerful force in entertainment, capable of inspiring, connecting, and pushing boundaries. We support our players with elite coaching, mental performance resources, and cutting-edge training environments.

Whether we’re lighting up the main stage or growing our fanbase online, Welt Esports stands for passion, perseverance, and performance. As we continue to rise, we invite gamers, fans, and partners to be a part of our journey—to create, compete, and conquer together under one banner: Welt.

#Thrist For Gamers! 
#getweltified

snippet.title: 100,000 UC CRIMSON SKYBLADE M416 MAXING OUT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/

snippet.title: Punarvika Full Song  || Pulsar bike ramana || Punarvika emotional song ||  save Punarvika new song
snippet.description:
Punarvika Full Song  || Pulsar bike ramana || Punarvika emotional song ||  save Punarvika new song

ఈ పాట యెక్క భావం పునర్విక గారు తండ్రి సురేష్ గారు ఆవేదనని తలుచుకుంటూ ఊహించి చేసిన పాట ఇది.

ఇ పాట ముందే ట్రావిలింగ్ జగదీష్ బ్రదర్ కి పునర్విక గారు తండ్రి ఆయనంటి వంటి సురేష్ గారికి వినిపించి ఈ పాట ఇలా అనుకుంటున్న చేయమంటర అని అడిగిన తరువాతే ఇ వీడియో లో కొన్ని సీన్స్ తీయడం జరిగింది. 

ఇ పాట వల్ల అ పిల్లకి ఎంతో కొంత న్యాయం జరుగుతుంది అని. ఆర్థికంగా ఎంతో కొంత హెల్ప్ అవుతుంది అని. 
ఉన్న చాలా తక్కువ టైం లో కంగరు కంగరు గా ఇ పాట చేశా. ఎటువంటి లోపాలు ఇ పాట లో చూడకండి.🙏

నావంతు గా ₹10,000 రూపాయలు సహాయం చేశాను. ఇ పాట కి పెట్టిన అమౌంట్ మీకు చెప్పాలి అనుకోవట్లేదు. అలాగే ఇ పాటకి వచ్చిన ప్రతి ఒక్క రూపాయి అ పాపకి ఇచ్చేయాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాను. 

నా ఈ ప్రయత్నం ఆ పాపకి ఈ పాట ద్వారా ఎంతో సహాయం అందాలని ఆశిస్తూ.... 
ఆ పాప త్వరగా కోలుకోవాలని కోరుకుంటున్నాను. లైక్స్ కామెంట్స్ ఈ పాటకు అవసరం లేదు. షేర్ చేసి ఇంకెంతో అ కుటుంబానికి మద్దతుగా మనమందరం నిలుద్దాం. 

ఇట్లు మీ ప్రేమతో పల్సర్ బైక్ రమణ.

te.title: Punarvika Full Song  || Pulsar bike ramana || Punarvika emotional song ||  save Punarvika new song
te.description:
Punarvika Full Song  || Pulsar bike ramana || Punarvika emotional song ||  save Punarvika new song

ఈ పాట యెక్క భావం పునర్విక గారు తండ్రి సురేష్ గారు ఆవేదనని తలుచుకుంటూ ఊహించి చేసిన పాట ఇది.

ఇ పాట ముందే ట్రావిలింగ్ జగదీష్ బ్రదర్ కి పునర్విక గారు తండ్రి ఆయనంటి వంటి సురేష్ గారికి వినిపించి ఈ పాట ఇలా అనుకుంటున్న చేయమంటర అని అడిగిన తరువాతే ఇ వీడియో లో కొన్ని సీన్స్ తీయడం జరిగింది. 

ఇ పాట వల్ల అ పిల్లకి ఎంతో కొంత న్యాయం జరుగుతుంది అని. ఆర్థికంగా ఎంతో కొంత హెల్ప్ అవుతుంది అని. 
ఉన్న చాలా తక్కువ టైం లో కంగరు కంగరు గా ఇ పాట చేశా. ఎటువంటి లోపాలు ఇ పాట లో చూడకండి.🙏

నావంతు గా ₹10,000 రూపాయలు సహాయం చేశాను. ఇ పాట కి పెట్టిన అమౌంట్ మీకు చెప్పాలి అనుకోవట్లేదు. అలాగే ఇ పాటకి వచ్చిన ప్రతి ఒక్క రూపాయి అ పాపకి ఇచ్చేయాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాను. 

నా ఈ ప్రయత్నం ఆ పాపకి ఈ పాట ద్వారా ఎంతో సహాయం అందాలని ఆశిస్తూ.... 
ఆ పాప త్వరగా కోలుకోవాలని కోరుకుంటున్నాను. లైక్స్ కామెంట్స్ ఈ పాటకు అవసరం లేదు. షేర్ చేసి ఇంకెంతో అ కుటుంబానికి మద్దతుగా మనమందరం నిలుద్దాం. 

ఇట్లు మీ ప్రేమతో పల్సర్ బైక్ రమణ.

snippet.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of 2026- "Ishqa'n De Lekhe".

Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bhullar returns with yet another masterpiece — and this one is nothing short of magical. This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.

Mark your calendars. Book your seats. 🗓️ Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026

#IshqanDeLekhe #GurnamBhullar #IshaMalviya #PunjabiMovies #PunjabiMovieTrailer #NewPunjabiMovie #SpeedRecords #PunjabiMovie2026 #UpcomingPunjabiMovies

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat II | Official Trailer II
snippet.description:
The wait is almost over! Mortal Kombat II arrives in theaters and IMAX May 8. #MortalKombatMovie #FilmedForIMAX

From New Line Cinema comes the latest high-stakes installment in the blockbuster video game franchise in all its brutal glory, Mortal Kombat II. This time, the fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Director Simon McQuoid returns to helm the follow up to his explosive 2021cinematic adventure, from a screenplay by Jeremy Slater, based on the videogame created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. The film is produced by Todd Garner, E. Bennett Walsh, James Wan, Toby Emmerich and Simon McQuoid, and executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Jeremy Slater, Ed Boon and Lawrence Kasanoff.

Joining McQuoid behind the camera are director of photography Stephen F. Windon, production designer Yohei Taneda, editor Stuart Levy and costume designer Cappi Ireland, with casting by Rich Delia and music by Benjamin Wallfisch. 

New Line Cinema Presents an Atomic Monster/Broken Road Production, a Fireside Films Production, Mortal Kombat II. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on May 8, 2026, and internationally beginning 6 May 2026.

snippet.title: The Mummy Returns - Official 25th Anniversary Trailer (2026) Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz
snippet.description:
Check out The Mummy Returns 25th anniversary trailer for the upcoming theatrical re-release of the sequel to the 1999 action film, The Mummy. The Mummy Returns stars Brendan Fraser (as Rick O’Connell) and Rachel Weisz (as Evelyn). 

Set 10 years after the events of the first film, The Mummy Returns picks up in 1933 with the swashbuckling heroes now married and living in London. Parents to eight-year-old Alex (Freddie Boath), the couple brings the boy along to their Egyptian expeditions, where they inadvertently uncover a rare artifact, the Bracelet of Anubis. The piece once belonged to a fearsome warrior known as the Scorpion King (Dwayne Johnson in his feature film debut) and can be used to command his army of jackal-like fighters. 

Back in London, trouble begins after the bracelet locks onto Alex’s wrist, just as a cult planning to resurrect the powerful mummy Imhotep (Arnold Vosloo), kidnaps Evelyn. Suddenly, father and son are forced to undertake a dangerous rescue mission alongside Evelyn’s spoiled brother (John Hannah), one that pits them against Meela Nais (Patricia Velasquez). The physical reincarnation of Imhotep’s ancient lover, she hopes Imhotep will defeat the Scorpion King in battle, thereby conquering the world.

Dodging all manner of unimaginable threats—death-defying chases, merciless hand-to-hand combat, even ritual sacrifice—the O’Connell family bravely fights to save the globe, and one another, from certain destruction.

The Mummy Returns, directed by Stephen Sommers, returns to US theaters on March 27, 2026 for a very special limited engagement.

#TheMummyReturns #Movies #IGN

snippet.title: తెనాలి రామకృష్ణ Trailer EP- 567 | Tenali Rama | S-01 | Contiloe Studios Telugu #tenalirama
snippet.description:
తెనాలి రామకృష్ణ ఎపిసోడ్ 567 Trailer

పూర్తి సీరియల్:  Tenali Rama Krishna All episode's @https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLeAlg0HLBzEsBu8SI_nU2D4nvvc1wGz5W 

A Tale of Tenali Ramakrishna: -
______________________________________
The Witty Poet of Krishna Devaraya’s Court, Blessed by Goddess Kali, Tenali Rama earned the title "Vikatakavi" (The Witty Poet) for his sharp intellect. Despite personal struggles, he rose to become the esteemed Aasthana Kavi (Court Poet) of Emperor Krishna Devaraya. With clever solutions to complex problems, he won the kingdom’s admiration, leaving a lasting legacy as one of history’s most brilliant minds.

Cast:
--------
Krishna Bharadwaj as Pandit Ramakrishna
Pankaj Berry as Rajguru Acharya Thathacharya
Manav Gohil as Sri Krishnadevaraya
Niya Sharma as Sharda
Nimisha Vakharia as Laxmi (Tenali Ramakrishna's Mother)
Sonia Sharma as Chinnadevi
Priyanka Singh as Tirumalamba
Jiten Mukhi as Mahamantri Timmarusu
Deepak Dutt Sharma as Gundappa
Sohit Vijay Soni as Mani
Sanjay manghnani as Dhani
Neha Chauhan as Varunamala

Subscribe to Contiloe Studio Telugu channel-http://www.youtube.com/@ContiloeStudiosTelugu

#tenaliramakrishna #tenaliramakrishnawebseries #telugumythology #telugustories #contiloestudiostelugu #వికటకవి #తెనాలిరామకృష్ణ #తెనాలిరామకృష్ణపూర్తిసీరియల్ #tenalirama #tenaliraman #vikatakavi #indianfolklore #teluguserial #tenalirama

snippet.title: जीजा हलके डलिहा (4K Video) #Shivani Singh New Song | Jija Halke Daliha | Bhojpuri Holi Gaana 2026
snippet.description:
Holi 2026 ka sabse dhamakedar gaana! Shivani Singh lekar aayi hain apna naya Holi special track "Jija Halke Daliha". Rang, gulal aur thumkon ke saath is Holi ka maza doguna karein !

Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :-

►Song - Jija Halke Daliha
►Singer - Shivani Singh
►Featuring - Simran Chaudhary
►Lyrics - Bittu Vidhyarthi
►Music Director - Railhan Studios, Prakash Soni
►Video Director - Govind Prajapati
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 44824

♪ Apple Music : 
♪ Amazon Prime Music : 
♪ YouTube Music :

Connected with us !

👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08

Lyrics - 

फगुवां खेले ए हो जीजाजी 
फगुवां खेले हो 
दिदिया के ना ले अईल, आईल बाड़ अकेले हो 
छली बड़ी हउव, नाही अबकी छलिह हो.. नाही अबकी छलीह 
लेले बाड़ अबीरिया लहे लहे मलिह
जीजा हो तनी हलके डलिह 
देख के मौका नाही चाल कवनो चलिह 
   जीजा हो तनी हलके डलिह 

1-लागी गईल फगुवां मे लगन, होई गईल देहिया के गजन ए जीजा 
बढ़ गईल चोलिया के वजन, छोड़ दी कुछु लगइहे सजन 
बाकि कुल जगहा जवन मन बा कलीह हो.. जवन मन बा कलीह 
लेले बाड़ अबीरिया लहे लहे......


2- गिल भइल मन भीतर भीतर 
     गरम भइल बा जैसे हीटर ए जीजा 
बहे पसीना लीटर लीटर...
बिगड़ता अब मोर चरितर 
असही धधाके जनी हमके धलीह हो 
दइया अइसे धलीह 
लेले बाड़ अबीरिया लहे लहे मलिह

#payalkikhanak #golinindki #anilrawat
Payal Ki Khanak | Hindi New Song | Anil Rawat,Kajal | Mohit,Anshu | Bhaigiri Music

For Business Enquires and any other Enquires
Contact- 8959171538
email- princeyadav708090@gmail.com

Follow Me On Instagram-   / princeyadav88  

Audio Credits 
►Album: Payal Ki Khanak Se Jagege Sajna
►Song:  Payal Ki Khanak Se Jagege Sajna
►Singer: Anil Rawat & Kajal Hathrasi 
►Lyrics: Anil Rawat,Rambal Rawat 
►Music: JPS Music - 

Video credit- 
Prince Yadav
Kalpana raj
rawsahab singh bundela
rahul yadav
abhishek yadav
ginni raja
ramraja

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.description:

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Karan Chaudhary
🎤 Singers: Kabir Singhora & Sarita Yadav
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music
🎶 Composer: Himanshu Rajput
🎬 Director: Nicky Singh
 📽 DoP: Munish Sharma
💻 Edit & DI: Sunny Panchal
🖼️ Poster : Vivek Kumar (Climax Studio)
👔 Producer: Shiv Pratap Singh

video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम Ram Naam Jap Powerful Ram Bhajan #bhajan
snippet.description:
#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
Lyrics, Music & Composer:  Kuldeep Mahar
Singer : Sagar Bedardi
Editing: Lala Mothiyapura
Music Label : Lok Rasiya Studio

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे




Nonstop Ram Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Ram Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Ram Siya Ram The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Ram Dhun 2025, Ram Naam Jap Bhajan, मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम, Shri Ram Bhajan, Ram Devotional Song, Ram Mantra Jap, Ram Naam Stotra, Shri Ram Ka Bhajan, Bajao Bhakti, 1 Hour Ram Dhun, Nonstop Ram Dhun

hi.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम Ram Naam Jap Powerful Ram Bhajan #bhajan
hi.description:
#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
Lyrics, Music & Composer:  Kuldeep Mahar
Singer : Sagar Bedardi
Editing: Lala Mothiyapura
Music Label : Lok Rasiya Studio

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

Title: Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho
Singer: 
Music Director: 
Lyrics: Traditional

Song Lyrics:
जो में ऐसा जानती, प्रीत करे दुःख होये
Jo Mein Aisa Janti, Preet Kare Dukh Hoye
नगर में ढिंढोरा पीट ती, प्रीत ना करीओ कोई
Nagar Dhindora Peet Ti, Preet Na Kario Koi

इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

क्या होते हैं आंसू, क्या पीड़ा होती है
Kya Hote Hain Aasoo, Kya Peeda Hoti Hai
क्यूँ दर्द उठता है, क्यूँ आँखे रोती है
Kyun Dard Uthta Hai, Kyun Aankhen Roti Hai

Kya Hote Hain Aasoo, Kya Peeda Hoti Hai
क्यूँ दर्द उठता है, क्यूँ आँखे रोती है,
Kyun Dard Uthta Hai, Kyun Aankhen Roti Hai

इक बार आंसू तो बहा कर देखो साँवरिया,
Ek Baar Aansoo Toh Baha Kar Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

जब कोई सुनेगा ना, तेरे मन के दुखड़े
Jab Koi Sunega Na, Tere Mann Ke Dukhde
जब ताने सुन सुन कर, होंगे दिल के टुकड़े
Jab Tane Sun Sun Kar, Honge Dil Ke Tukde
जब कोई सुनेगा ना, तेरे मन के दुखड़े,
Jab Koi Sunega Na, Tere Mann Ke Dukhde
जब ताने सुन सुन कर, होंगे दिल के टुकड़े
Jab Tane Sun Sun Kar, Honge Dil Ke Tukde

इक बार जरा तुम ताने सुनकर देखो साँवरिया,
Ek Baar Jara Tum Tane Sunkar Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

क्या जानोगे मोहन, तुम प्रेम की भाषा
Kya Janoge Mohan, Tum Prem Ki Bhasha
क्या होती है आशा, क्या होती निराशा
Kya Hoti Hai Asha, Kya Hoti Nirasha

इक बार जरा तुम प्रेम करके देखो साँवरिया
Ek Baar Jara Tum Prem Karke Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

पनघट पे मधुबन में, वो इन्तजार करना
Panghat Pe Madhuban Mein, Woh Intezaar Karna
कही श्याम तेरे खातिर, वो घुट घुट के मरना
Kahin Shyam Tere Khatir, Woh Ghut Ghut Ke Marna
पनघट पे मधुबन में, वो इन्तजार करना
Panghat Pe Madhuban Mein, Woh Intezaar Karna
कही श्याम तेरे खातिर, वो घुट घुट के मरना
Kahin Shyam Tere Khatir, Woh Ghut Ghut Ke Marna

इक बार किसी का इन्तजार कर देखो साँवरिया
Ek Baar Kisi Ka Intezaar Kar Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

साँसों में राधा है
Saanson Mein Radha Hai
धड़कन में राधा है
Dhadkan Mein Radha Hai
राधा बिना देखो
Radha Bina Dekho
यह श्याम आधा है
Yeh Shyam Aadha Hai

दरपन भी है राधा
Darpan Bhi Hai Radha
दर्शन भी है राधा
Darshan Bhi Hai Radha
कान्हा नित नित बोले
Kanha Nit Nit Bole
मेरा रोम रोम राधा
Mera Rom Rom Radha

हो हो हो हो
Ho Ho Ho Ho
राधा का हर आंसू
Radha Ka Har Aansoo
प्रेम की पीड़ा बनकर के
Prem Ki Peedha Bankar Ke
कान्हा की आँखों से बहे
Kanha Ki Aankhon Se Bahe

snippet.title: Balam Subedaar (Song): Anil Kapoor | Subedaar | GD Kaur| Balam Thanedar| Gypsy| Latest Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
Fauji Roop, Desi Swag with Gypsy Song! Presenting the latest haryanvi song “Balam Subedaar (Song)” from the upcoming film Subedaar. Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik.

Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India!

Song Credits:
Singer – GD Kaur
Music – Rutvik Talashilkar, Shine, Raj Mawer
Lyrics – YoungVeer, Rohtash Gagsiniya
Music Label – T-Series

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

[Latest Haryanvi Song, New Haryanvi Song, Balam Subedaar, Balam Thanedar, Gypsy Song, GD Kaur Balam Thanedar, Mera Balam Thanedar Chalave Gypsy]

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
snippet.description:
#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan
#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan

1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे




Nonstop Ram Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Ram Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Ram Siya Ram The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Ram Dhun 2025, Ram Naam Jap Bhajan, मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम, Shri Ram Bhajan, Ram Devotional Song, Ram Mantra Jap, Ram Naam Stotra, Shri Ram Ka Bhajan, Bajao Bhakti, 1 Hour Ram Dhun, Nonstop Ram Dhun

#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan #bhajan #hindibhajan

snippet.title: Franklin Touch Anything Become Diamond & King of Gold in GTA 5 in Telugu | SHINCHAN and CHOP
snippet.description:
Franklin Touch Anything Become Diamond & King of Gold in GTA 5 in Telugu | SHINCHAN and CHOP
Don't forget to leave a Like, Comment and Subscribe Favorite, plz helps out a lot.

Franklin and Shinchan are back with another insane adventure in GTA 5!  In this Part 2 Bangla gameplay, anything they touch instantly turns into DIAMOND and GOLD ! From cars to buildings, everything becomes super rich and crazy.
Watch till the end to see the most expensive transformations, funny moments, and unexpected chaos in Los Santos! This GTA 5 mod makes the game more fun and powerful than ever.

Thanks For Watching.
#gta5 #shinchangta5 #gta5billionaire #part2 #gta5mods #gta #gta5franklin #gta5telugu

snippet.title: Adivasi New Song | भोंगरियु हालावो | Singer Rakesh Dudwe | भंगोरिया वीडियो #adivasi
snippet.description:
धन-धन सतगुरु | जय जोहार जय आदिवासी 🙏
Bhole Digital Recording Studio Presents
Our new Adivasi song “Bhongriyu Halavo” is inspired by the vibrant traditions, emotions, and colorful life of Adivasi culture. This song reflects the true spirit of love, celebration, and togetherness that lives in every heartbeat of our community.
This official video beautifully showcases the rich heritage, natural beauty, traditional dance, and soulful music that represent the pride and identity of Adivasi people.
Let’s celebrate our culture, our identity, and our music together. ❤️🔥
🎵 Song Credits
► Song Title: Bhongriyu Halavo
► Singer: Rakesh Dudwe & Sakshi Bhandari
► Artist: Aasish Chohan & Ritika Dodwa
► Lyrics: Sohan Bhai Rajawat & Rakesh Dudwe
► Music: Jiten Dawar
► Composer: Akshay Gole
► Recording: Bhole Digital Recording Studio, Palsud
► Mixing & Mastering: Akshay Gole
Dop - Aakesh Thakur ( Thakur Photography )
► Video Editing: Durgesh Prajapat
►poster design - Dev Art
► Director: Aasish Chohan
► Producer: Akshay Gole

बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

आओ आओ गजानन आओ
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे

गणपति गणेश को मेरा प्रणाम

लड्डुवन का भोग हूँ लाई

श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

गणेश जी के रोज नए नए भजन सुनने के लिए हमारे साथ जुड़ें रहे व् नए नए भजनों का आनंद उठाये भजन पसंद आये तो कमेंट में '' जय श्री गणेश " जरुर लिखें || Jai Shree Shyam 🌹🌹

⭐Song :  
आओ आओ गजानन आओ
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे
गजानंद तुम्हे पहले मनाएं
मेरे घर भी पधारो देवा
गजानन कर दो बेड़ा पार
गणपति गणेश को मेरा प्रणाम 
श्री गणेश अमृतवाणी
लड्डुवन का भोग हूँ लाई 
श्री गणेश जी के 108 नाम
सुखकर्ता दुःखहर्ता आरती
⭐Singer : Sanchit + Upasana mehta 
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)
भक्ति साधना कंपनी से भजन बनवाने के लिए और भजन रिलीज़ करवाने के लिए संपर्क करे 9466651081

snippet.title: Teri Yadon Ki Chadar Odhe | तेरी यादो की चादर ओढ़े |Instagram Viral Song | HR Vaibhaw New Song |
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe
Singer- Shobi Sarwan 


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: China फिर घुसा Bharat में MODI का Counter Att@ck याद रखेगा चीन | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain
snippet.description:
China फिर घुसा Bharat में MODI का Counter Att@ck याद रखेगा चीन | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain 

The ice is cracking in the Himalayas. It is not climate change. It is military explosives.

The global chessboard was just flipped upside down. India is no longer watching from the sidelines. It is pulling the strings.

In the last 24 hours, three massive shockwaves hit the geopolitical radar. First, India entered "Pax Silica," a massive US-led tech alliance designed to entirely cut China out of the trillion-dollar semiconductor supply chain. Second, France aggressively bypassed Washington to forge a dominant AI and quantum computing pact with New Delhi. Third, the Middle East quietly transformed the IMEC trade route into a heavily fortified security axis, tying Gulf survival directly to India’s rise.

But every action has a violent reaction. Beijing is panicking.
In direct retaliation to India's tech dominance, Chinese military bulldozers are blasting through the freezing Shaksgam Valley. Commercial satellites caught them red-handed building a permanent military artery aimed straight at India’s Siachen Glacier. A two-front collusive threat with Pakistan is rapidly becoming a geographical nightmare.

The digital cold war just triggered a physical arms race at 15,000 feet. India is responding with total, uncompromising defiance, accelerating the 1,840-kilometer Arunachal Frontier Highway.

The era of a neutral India is dead. New Delhi is now the ultimate geopolitical fortress. Dive into the undeniable satellite proof, the secret digital treaties, and the ticking countdown in the mountains.
The next 30 days will dictate the new world order.

#indiageopolitics  #chinaborder  #shaksgamvalley  #semiconductorwar  #imec  #globalstrategicshift



About:

Sumeet Jain is a leading growth specialist and geopolitical analyst with a deep focus on the economic and political landscapes of China, India, and Pakistan. He combines expertise in business and personal development with sophisticated regional geopolitical analysis, providing unique and valuable perspectives.

As a corporate trainer, mentor, and author, Jain empowers individuals and organizations to achieve their potential. His coaching programs foster growth, success, and strategic business acumen.

His analysis, delivered via his YouTube channel and written works, delves into economic trends, financial markets, and political developments. He offers insightful commentary on the interplay of these factors, shaping the future of these nations. His understanding of business analytics, coupled with keen observation of political and financial shifts, allows for nuanced perspectives. He is a recognized authority, offering practical advice and informed analysis of the intricate geopolitical dynamics.

⚠️I will NEVER contact you for business or promotions (even if it comes from my legit email). I will not use IG, Telegram, or whatsapp to reach out - please ignore and report those accounts.⚠️⚠️⚠️

Connect with me on: 

👉 Our New "ENGLISH CHANNEL" :  https://www.youtube.com/@GoBeyondWithSumeetJain

👉 WhatsApp Channel: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VanS96w9hXF80NR7Bj0N

👉EMAIL: Coffeewithsumeetjain@gmail.com

👉YOUTUBE for SHORTS/CLIPS : https://www.youtube.com/@SumeetJainClips

👉 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/coffeewithsumeetjain2025?utm_source=qr&igsh=MWtnaGplb250MjRhdg==

en.title: China फिर घुसा Bharat में MODI का Counter Att@ck याद रखेगा चीन | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain
en.description:
China फिर घुसा Bharat में MODI का Counter Att@ck याद रखेगा चीन | CWSJ-3059 | Sumeet Jain 

The ice is cracking in the Himalayas. It is not climate change. It is military explosives.

The global chessboard was just flipped upside down. India is no longer watching from the sidelines. It is pulling the strings.

In the last 24 hours, three massive shockwaves hit the geopolitical radar. First, India entered "Pax Silica," a massive US-led tech alliance designed to entirely cut China out of the trillion-dollar semiconductor supply chain. Second, France aggressively bypassed Washington to forge a dominant AI and quantum computing pact with New Delhi. Third, the Middle East quietly transformed the IMEC trade route into a heavily fortified security axis, tying Gulf survival directly to India’s rise.

But every action has a violent reaction. Beijing is panicking.
In direct retaliation to India's tech dominance, Chinese military bulldozers are blasting through the freezing Shaksgam Valley. Commercial satellites caught them red-handed building a permanent military artery aimed straight at India’s Siachen Glacier. A two-front collusive threat with Pakistan is rapidly becoming a geographical nightmare.

The digital cold war just triggered a physical arms race at 15,000 feet. India is responding with total, uncompromising defiance, accelerating the 1,840-kilometer Arunachal Frontier Highway.

The era of a neutral India is dead. New Delhi is now the ultimate geopolitical fortress. Dive into the undeniable satellite proof, the secret digital treaties, and the ticking countdown in the mountains.
The next 30 days will dictate the new world order.

#indiageopolitics  #chinaborder  #shaksgamvalley  #semiconductorwar  #imec  #globalstrategicshift



About:

Sumeet Jain is a leading growth specialist and geopolitical analyst with a deep focus on the economic and political landscapes of China, India, and Pakistan. He combines expertise in business and personal development with sophisticated regional geopolitical analysis, providing unique and valuable perspectives.

As a corporate trainer, mentor, and author, Jain empowers individuals and organizations to achieve their potential. His coaching programs foster growth, success, and strategic business acumen.

His analysis, delivered via his YouTube channel and written works, delves into economic trends, financial markets, and political developments. He offers insightful commentary on the interplay of these factors, shaping the future of these nations. His understanding of business analytics, coupled with keen observation of political and financial shifts, allows for nuanced perspectives. He is a recognized authority, offering practical advice and informed analysis of the intricate geopolitical dynamics.

snippet.title: Yaari  Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | Haryanvi songs Haryanavi 2026 #yaari
snippet.description:
Yaari (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | Haryanvi songs Haryanavi 2026 #yaari

Yaari (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2025 | Yaari (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Rohit Lamba, Vinay Yadav | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2025

Kiara Records & Rohit Lamba Presents “Yaari (Official Video)" a new haryanvi songs haryanavi 2025. This haryanvi song sung by Masoom Sharma. Starring with Rohit Lamba and Vinay Yadav. Lyrics are penned by Amar Karnawal. Music is given by Pinna Music. A Film by Mohan Betaab.


Subscribe Channel :  @tecnoaadibro 

#yaari​ #masoomsharma​  #rohitlamba​ #vinayyadav​ #pinnamusic​ #amarkarnawal​ #kiararecords​ #haryanvisong​ #haryanvisongs​ #haryanvimusic​ #newharyanvisong​ #newharyanvisong2025​ #haryanvisongsharyanavi​ #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025​ 

Lyrics -
Re Dedyu Sansa Ki Qurbani 
Du Ya Tere Pe Vaar Jawani 
Bhaiya Khatar Bhai Marjya 
Mardi Konya Yaar Janani...

Teri Khatar Naash Karange 
Dil Mei Tere Vaas Karange 
Sedhaniya Ke Baas Dharange...

Re Na Jaan Kati Dariye 
Jukar Duryodhan Ki Khatar
Ran Mei Karan Khadya Tha Adke
Nyuhi Teri Khater Khada Yaar Tera
Chinta Naa Kariye ….
Saamhi Arjun Ho Ya Koi Uste bhi bada Yodha Je na Mila Khaak Mei Aaya Toh Fer Baat Kariye ..

Re Junse Chale Khilafat Mei Na Unene Bilkul Chalan Da
Agle Kare baat Maran ki 
Hum Na Baal Bhi Hallan Da
Un Ne Andaza Bhi Konya Mahara Jeen Ka Fayda Ke
Mahre Hote Haath Gerde Mahara Jeen Ka Fayda Ke ..
Re 
Unki Teere Laash Naale Mei 
Beshak Karde Fon Saale Nei
Jindgi Di Uppar Aale Nei
Jeeke Suthri Dhaal Mariye... 

Jyukar Duryodhan Ki Khatar 
Ran Mei Karan Khada Tha Aadke 
Nyue Teri Khatar Khada yaar Tera
Chinta na kariye …
Re Saamhi Arjun Ho Ya Koi Uste Bhi Bada Yodha Je Na Mila Khaak Mei Aaya Mere Te Fer Baat Kariye ..

Jo Asal Mard Mei Khubi Wo Mahare Saari Pawengi 
Ghaate Mei Khoon Ho Chae Na Howe Par Khudari Pawegi..
Amar Mei Nu Toh Bojh S Thoda Par Baat Bhari Pawegi... Karnawliya Lakh Bura Par Na Gadari Pawegi
Aare Hum Issi Baat Te Chaegye Jiste Lage To Bs Lagye Humto Yaari Tod Nibhaya Gaye Tu Bi Baat Te Na Firye

Jyukar Duryodhan Ki Khatar 
Ran Mei Karan Khada Tha Aadke 
Nyue Teri Khatar Khada yaar Tera
Chinta na kariye
Re Saamhi Arjun Ho Ya Koi Uste Bhi Bada Yodha Je Na Mila Khaak Mei Aaya Mere Te Fer Baat Kariye

snippet.title: Naane Neenanthe 8K Video Song | BRAT | Darling Krishna | Manisha | AJ | Shashank
snippet.description:
Presenting The Naane Neenanthe 8K Video Song From The Movie “BRAT ” Starring : Darling Krishna, Manisha, Achyuth Kumar, Ramesh Indira, Dragon Manju & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Kannada Youtube Channel..!!! 
------------------
The trio of Chartbuster JAGAVE NEENU GELATHIYE, Shashank X Sid Sriram X Arjun Janya are back with Another Soulful Stunner!" 
-------------------
To Listen On Your Favourite Music Streaming Platform
♪ Jiosaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/naane-neenanthe-from-brat/RjgzdT4FeQQ
♪ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/4S8oIZNUK40qjTOzx4M32R
♪ Amazon - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B0FJTT9G51
♪ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/song/naane-neenanthe-from-brat/1828710534
♪ Youtube Music & Shorts : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=RjRYOELTDgo
♪ Gaana Music : https://gaana.com/song/naane-neenanthe
♪ Insta Reels - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/605866648903369/
♪ Josh - https://share.myjosh.in/audio/2a343850-2ce9-4046-9260-14b94478dd5b
-----------------
Song: Naane Neenanthe
Lyrics- Shashank

Pallavi: 
ನಾನೇ- ನೀನಂತೆ ನೀನಂತೆ 
ನೀನೇ- ನಾನಂತೆ ನಾನಂತೆ 
ಜೀವಾ..ಒಂದೇನೆ,ಹೃದಯ ಎರಡು 

ನಮ್ಮ- ನಡುವೆ ಬರಲಿ ನೂರು- ಮುನಿಸು ಜಗಳ 
ಹಾಗೆ.. ಇರಲಿ ಪ್ರೀತಿ ಸೊಗಡು

ಜೊತೆಯಲಿ ನೀನಿದ್ದರೆ ಎದೆಯಲಿ ಸಡಗರ 
ನಿನ್ನ ನಗು ಎಲ್ಲದಕ್ಕೂ ಪರಿಹಾರ

ನನ್ನಯ ನಾಳೆ- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಪಾಲೆ ನನ್ನಾ ಬದುಕೆ ನಿನ್ನದು ಗೆಳತಿ.

ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು- ರೆಪ್ಪೆಯ ಹಾಗೆ  ಜನುಮ ಪೂರಾ ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
ಕೋರುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಗಾಳಿಯ ಹಾಗೆ  ಉಸಿರು ಇರೋ ತನಕಾನೆ..
ಚರಣ: 1:
ಬದುಕಿನ ಕೊರತೆಯನು ತುಂಬಿಂದ ನಾಯಕಿಯೇ 
ನಿನ್ನದೆ ಮುನ್ನುಡಿಯೇ ನಲ್ಮೆಯ ಬಾಳಿಗೆ..

ಮನಸಿನ ಮಹಡಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ಮುಗುಳುನಗೆ 
ಕನಸಿನ ದಾರಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ದೀವಿಗೆ 

ನಿನ್ನ ಒಲವಾ ಕರೆಗೆ ಕೊಡುವೆ ಪೂರ್ತಿ ಸಮಯಾ 
ನನ್ನ ಕೊರಳಾ ಬಳಸಿ ಹೇಳು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ವಿಷಯಾ 

ನನ್ನಯ ಕೋಪ ನನ್ನಯ ತಾಳ್ಮೆ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ನಿನ್ನಯ ವಶವೇ ಗೆಳತಿ..

II ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು II 
ಚರಣ: 2 (FEMALE)
ನೀನು ಹತ್ತಿರ.. ಇದ್ದರೂ.. ಹುಡುಕುವೆ ನಿನ್ನನೇ..
ಅಂತ ಪರಿ ಸೆಳೆತ ನೀನು ಇನಿಯ..

ನಿನ್ನ ಬದಲು, ಬೇರೇನು, ಸಿಕ್ಕರೂನು ಒಪ್ಪೆನೂ 
ನೀನೇ ನನ್ನ- ನಾಡಿಮಿಡಿತ ಗೆಳೆಯಾ..
M: ಕಡಲ ಅಲೆಯಾ ಹಾಗೆ, ನೀನು ನನ್ನ ಒಳಗೆ..
F: ರಾತ್ರಿ ಸುರಿದಾ ಮಳೆಯ ಸೊಬಗು ನೀನು ನನಗೆ
M: ನೋವಿಗೆ ಮದ್ದು- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಸ್ಪರ್ಶ.. ನಿನ್ನಾ ನೆನಪೇ ನನಗೆ ಹರುಷ 
F: ಸೋಲುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಪ್ರೀತಿಯ ಮುಂದೆ, ಇಡದೆ ಯಾವ ಲೆಕ್ಕಾನೆ 
F: ದೇವರ ಮುಂದೆ- ಬೇಡುವೆ ನಾನು.. ಏಳೇಳು ಜನುಮ, ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
II ನಾನೇ II 
......................
♪ Movie: BRAT
♪ Banner: Dolphin Entertainment 
♪ Producer: Manjunath V. Kandkur
♪ Director: Shashank
♪ Song Title: Naane Neenanthe
♪ Music: Arjun Janya
♪ Singers: Sid Sriram | Lahari Mahesh
♪ Lyricist: Shashank
♪ DOP: Abhilash Kalathi

ಕನಸಿನ ದಾರಿಯಲಿ ನಿನ್ನದೇ ದೀವಿಗೆ 

ನಿನ್ನ ಒಲವಾ ಕರೆಗೆ ಕೊಡುವೆ ಪೂರ್ತಿ ಸಮಯಾ 
ನನ್ನ ಕೊರಳಾ ಬಳಸಿ ಹೇಳು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ವಿಷಯಾ 

ನನ್ನಯ ಕೋಪ ನನ್ನಯ ತಾಳ್ಮೆ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ನಿನ್ನಯ ವಶವೇ ಗೆಳತಿ..

II ಕಾಯುವೆ ನಾನು II 
ಚರಣ: 2 (FEMALE)
ನೀನು ಹತ್ತಿರ.. ಇದ್ದರೂ.. ಹುಡುಕುವೆ ನಿನ್ನನೇ..
ಅಂತ ಪರಿ ಸೆಳೆತ ನೀನು ಇನಿಯ..

ನಿನ್ನ ಬದಲು, ಬೇರೇನು, ಸಿಕ್ಕರೂನು ಒಪ್ಪೆನೂ 
ನೀನೇ ನನ್ನ- ನಾಡಿಮಿಡಿತ ಗೆಳೆಯಾ..
M: ಕಡಲ ಅಲೆಯಾ ಹಾಗೆ, ನೀನು ನನ್ನ ಒಳಗೆ..
F: ರಾತ್ರಿ ಸುರಿದಾ ಮಳೆಯ ಸೊಬಗು ನೀನು ನನಗೆ
M: ನೋವಿಗೆ ಮದ್ದು- ನಿನ್ನಯ ಸ್ಪರ್ಶ.. ನಿನ್ನಾ ನೆನಪೇ ನನಗೆ ಹರುಷ 
F: ಸೋಲುವೆ ನಿನ್ನ- ಪ್ರೀತಿಯ ಮುಂದೆ, ಇಡದೆ ಯಾವ ಲೆಕ್ಕಾನೆ 
F: ದೇವರ ಮುಂದೆ- ಬೇಡುವೆ ನಾನು.. ಏಳೇಳು ಜನುಮ, ನಿನ್ನನ್ನೇ..
II ನಾನೇ II

snippet.title: तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Pratibha Sinha
snippet.description:
हिंदी सिनेमा के सुनहरे दौर, 90 के दशक की मधुर आवाज़ें - आशा भोसले और कुमार सानू! इस वीडियो में, हम आपके लिए लेकर आए हैं फिल्म 'कल की आवाज़' का दिल छू लेने वाला गीत "तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा", जो प्यार और रोमांस की गहराईयों को छूता है। 

यह गीत न केवल एक मधुर रचना है, बल्कि यह उस दौर की यादें भी ताज़ा करता है जब संगीत में सादगी और भावनाएं कूट-कूट कर भरी होती थीं। आशा जी की आवाज़ की मिठास और कुमार सानू जी के दिलकश अंदाज़ ने इस गाने को अमर बना दिया है।

तो आइये, इस खूबसूरत गीत को सुनें और खो जाएं प्यार के रंग में। हमें कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपको यह गाना कैसा लगा और आपका पसंदीदा 90s का रोमांटिक गाना कौन सा है!



Credits :

Song: Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट करें और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें। आपका साथ हमें और भी बेहतर संगीत लाने के लिए प्रेरित करता है।

संगीत की यह जादू हमेशा ज़िंदा रहे…

#AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #HindiSongs #RomanticSongs #90sSongs #Bollywood #LoveSongs

►VG - 44593


Lyrics -

मुखड़ा _

बानी कुंवार त कुंवार चाही
 थोड़ा बदमाश रंगदार चाही 
** डाले रातभर ड्राइवर मोर भतार चाही 
हमरा त प्यार लगातार चाही 
  डाले रातभर..........

अंतरा -1

भर फागुन हमराला फिरी होखे ,
जाव ना दूर हमरा भीरी होखे,
(कोरस) टॉप लेबल के मिसतीरि होखे 
बांहे पगरी त लागे बवाली हो 
 (कोरस) - ना काम जाली करे,
जब हारन दबावे सिहर जानी
 ( कोरस) - रोड खाली करे,
बड़ पिचकारी बरियार चाही 
डाले रातभर.........

अंतरा - 2

पान खाके मुंह पूरा लाल राखें ,
हर घड़ी हमरे ख्याल राखें,
(कोरस) फागुन में खाली ना गाल राखें 
मूड बने में ओकर ना टाइम लागे 
 (कोरस) - रहे रेडी हो
हम ओकरा मोहब्बत में ए दादा 
(कोरस) - सभ देदी हो 
कृष्णा खेसारी जस कलाकार चाही 
डाले रातभर...........

चोलिया के हुक (Choliya Ke Hook Raja Ji) 
Keshiya bhi jhaar leni, pehnleni saari
Lali lagay leni, rupwa sawari......
Ego hotatay pheechwa se chuk rajaji....
Lagai dihin cholia ke huk raja ji.......
 
Kavan darajeeya ee kailas sheelai
Fas sake na huk kaise fasai......2
Kahe bujheli nahi humaar dukh rajaji.....2
Lagai dihin cholia ke huk raja ji.......2
 
Size ba chote, ekar badh bate sheena
Mamila salati nahi rauva bina......2
Deehi humara ta etna ta sukh rajai....2
Lagai dihin cholia ke huk raja ji.......2
 
Saiya amit tani, bhujhila lachariyaa
Badi ba door dumra ma bajariyaa.......2
Lagai dihin cholia ke huk raja ji.......2
 
Keshiya bhi jhaar leni, pehnleni saari
Lali lagay leni, rupwa sawari......2
Ego hotatay pheechwa se chuk rajaji....2
Lagai dihin cholia ke huk raja ji.......2

In Hindi - 

केशिया भी झार लेनी 
पेन्ह लेनी साड़ी 
लाली लगाई लेनी रुपवा सवारी 

एगो होताटे पिछवा से चूक राजा जी 
लगाई दी 
लगाई दिहि चोलिया के हुक राजा जी 

कवन दरजिया इ कईलस सिलाई 
बाटे सकेत हुक कईसे फसाई

काहे बूझीले नाही हमार दुःख राजाजी 
रउआ बूझीले नाही हमार दुःख राजाजी 
लगाई दिहि चोलिया के हुक राजा जी 

साइज बा छोट एकर बड़ बाटे सीना 
ममिला सलटी नाही रउआ बिना 

दिहि हमरा का अत्तनो त सुख राजाजी  
लगाई दिहि चोलिया के हुक राजा जी 

सईया अमित तनी बुझी लचरिया
बड़ी बा दुरी डुमराव बजरिया 
देरी करब त गाड़ी जाई छूट राजाजी 
लगाई दिहि चोलिया के हुक राजा

snippet.description:
#Video | नाच नागिन जैसन | #Raushan​ Rohi, #Khushi​ Kakkar | Nach Nagin Jaisan |  #Maghi​ Song

🎵 Video | नाच नागिन जैसन | Raushan Rohi & Khushi Kakkar | Nach Nagin Jaisan | New Maghi Song 2026 🎵
अगर आपको नागिन डांस वाला जबरदस्त गाना पसंद है तो ये वीडियो आपके लिए है! 🐍🔥
नए अंदाज़ और धमाकेदार म्यूजिक के साथ पेश है नाच नागिन जैसन – आवाज में Raushan Rohi और Khushi Kakkar।
इस Maghi गाने में मिलेगा जबरदस्त बीट, देसी स्टाइल और फुल एंटरटेनमेंट 💃🕺
🎤 Singer – Raushan Rohi & Khushi Kakkar
🎶 Song – Nach Nagin Jaisan
🎬 Video – Full HD
🎵 Genre – Maghi Folk / Dance Song
👉 वीडियो को पूरा देखें
👉 Like 👍 Comment 💬 Share 🔁 जरूर करें
👉 चैनल को Subscribe करना ना भूलें

snippet.description:
धन-धन सतगुरु । जय जोहार जय आदिवासी
Adivasi VDO Production Presents

Gulalya Haat is inspired by the vibrant Adivasi Bhangoriya Haat, where people come together to celebrate life with music, dance, colors, and joyful gatherings.
This official video beautifully captures the happiness, togetherness, and festive spirit of the traditional haat, showcasing the true essence of Adivasi culture.

🎬 Song Title
New Adivasi Song | Gulalya Haat | Bhongriya Song | Sanjay Kirade & Mahi Dawar | AVP  #adivasisong

🎥 Production Team

➤ Producer: Mukesh Solanki
➤ Director: Rohit Vaishaki (Aadiwood)
➤ Choreographer: Mayur Singh Chouhan & karan solanki
➤ Script Writer: Arjoon Solanki, Rohit Vaishaki, Anjay Barde

🌟 Featuring Artists
-Dora Dawar
-Gulatya,Vinzaa, 
-Mayur Chouhan, Priya Solanki, 
-Rupa Solanki, Ramasingh Bamane (Bahu), 
-Aruna Solanki, Ravindra Singh,
-Agesh Solanki 
- priyanka , kajal , Roshani ,

🎧 Audio Credits

➤ Singer: Sanjay Kirade, Mahi Dawar
➤ Lyrics: — Dhuriya Rawat Ma'am
➤ Recording Studio: Shanti Recording Studio, Jogwada
➤ Music: Ritesh Kirade
➤ Mix & Mastering: Ritesh Kirade
➤ Dhol Rhythm : DJ Arun More

🎞️ Post Production

➤ DOP: Pawan Bhosle
➤ Editing & Colorist: Rohit Vaishaki (Aadiwood)
➤ Graphic Designer: Mai Aadiwasi & Yuvi Graphics
➤ Channel Manager: Agesh Solanki
➤ Digital Partner: Adivasi Media 
➤ Creative Team : Chindra Wali (moni solanki )
➤ Music Label: Adivasi VDO Production (AVP)

👥 Management Team

Anjay Barde, Mahesh Solanki, Prince Solanki, Bawan Solanki, Gaja Solanki, saksham chouhan
Ankit Awaya, Ankit Solanki, Krish Solanki, Krishna Waskle, Rakesh Waskle,
Aman Waskle, Rahul Dawar, Rohit Dawar, Arpit Dawar, Vishal Solanki,
Ramlal Solanki, Kasiram Dawar, Sunil Kirade

👥 Management Team Girls  : Monika Solanki,Rupa Solanki  ,Seema Dawar,Soniya Arya,Pooja Solanki,Aruna Solanki,Pinky Solanki , khushi dawar , amisha, swati , antim , suhani,

snippet.title: Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte - (HD) | Radha Sang Holi Nanadlal Khelate | Special Holi Song
snippet.description:
Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte - (HD) | Radha Sang Holi Nanadlal Khelate | Special Holi Song

Song - Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Masti Laayi 
Singer - Lakhbir Singh Lakkha 
Music - Surinder Kohli, Natraj, Sohal Lal, Durga

Lyrics :
Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Holi Aayi,
Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।
Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Holi Aayi,
Masti Laayi Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।।

Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte ,
Rang Leke Khelte Gulal Leke Khelte ।
Radha Sang Holi Nandlal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।।

Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।
Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Jay Ho ।।

Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।
Holi Aayi Holi Aayi Holi Aayi,
Masti Laayi Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।।

Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।।

Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।
Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Jay Ho ।।

Masti Laayi Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।।

Masti Laayi Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।।

Radha Ji Gulaal Malee Shyam Ji Ke Mukh Pe ।
Saare Aaj Honge Laal Laal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।।

Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Sara Rara ।
Sara Rara Madan Gopal Khelte,
Bolo Sara Rara, Jay Ho ।।

Masti Laayi Masti Laayi Masti Laayi ।।

snippet.title: Jignesh Barot | Laganiyo (Official Video) | લાગણીયો | New Gujarati Song 2026
snippet.description:
“લાગણીયો” એક સુંદર અને દિલને સ્પર્શી જાય એવું ગીત છે, જેમાં Jignesh Barot ની મીઠી અવાજ લાગણીઓને જીવંત બનાવે છે। માત્ર @SaregamaGujarati  પર સાંભળો।

Credits:

Singer: Jignesh Barot
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Lyrics : Naresh Thakor Vayad
Music : Jackie Gajjar
Artist : Jignesh Barot ,Chhaya Thakor 
Co Artis: Bharti Chaudhari,Hashmukh Limbachiya 
Creative Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Concept Director: Vishnu Thakor (Adalaj)
Cemera :Montu Rajput
Editing :The Yellow Production 
Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya
Production: Jakirbhai
Makeup &hair : Hashmukh Limbachiya
Sport Boy: Gado,lalo
Light: Kalpesh Jadhav
Sound: Sunil Kachhiya
Jignesh Barot Costume: Ekata J Barot
Recording: Sargam Music Studio Patan ( Pankaj Mistry) 
Special Thanx : J D Bapu

Lyrics:

ઓ વિધાતા રુઠી ને મારી દુભાણી સે લાગણી(૨)
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
હો જોડે રહેવાની મારી હતી એક માગણી 
માગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
ઓ દુઃખ ભરી વેદના ની કરું કોને માગણી 
વાલભરી વાતો કોણ કરસે રે 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 
ઓ જોવા માગું વલખા મારું ગોરલ કયા દેખાય છે 
પગની જાજર ખખડાવે ભણકાર એવા થાય છે 
ઓ માયા લગાડી મેલી દીધો મનડું રે મુજાય છે 
જીવન ને મોત વચ્ચે જીવ જોલા ખાય છે 
ઓ વાત કરી વહાલી વરસતી રે વાંદડી 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે (૨)
ઓ મારા પ્રેમ ને પૂજતીતી પ્રેમ પાછળ હતી ઘેલી 
મારા હાથ માં ના રહી મારા હાથે રે સાચવેલી 
ઓ જીવ કહી બોલાવતી આજે જીવ થયો દૂર 
એકલો પાડિયો આજે હું તો થઈ ગયો ગાંડોતુર રે 
ઓ જરૂર હતી જેની નથી એની હાજરી 
હાજરિયો કોણ પૂરી કરસે રે 
લાગણીયો કેમ કરી વિહરસે રે 

#laganiyo
#jigneshbarot 
#jigneshkaviraj  
#saregamagujarati 
#gujaratisongs   
#gujaratilovesong  
#gujarati 
#ગુજરાતીગીત

snippet.title: तेरी मुरली की धुन सुनने मैं बरसाने से आयी   Teri Murli Ki Dhun   Most Popular Radha Krishna #bhajan
snippet.description:
hiतेरी मुरली की धुन सुनने मैं बरसाने से आयी   Teri Murli Ki Dhun   Most Popular Radha Krishna #bhajan
🙏 तेरी मुरली की धुन सुनने मैं बरसाने से आयी हूँ | श्री राधा कृष्ण भजन 🙏
यह एक मनमोहक भजन है जो श्रीकृष्ण और राधा रानी के दिव्य प्रेम को दर्शाता है।
इस गीत में राधा रानी की भावनाएँ व्यक्त की गई हैं जब वो श्रीकृष्ण की मधुर मुरली की धुन सुनकर बरसाने से वृंदावन आती हैं।

🎶 गीत की विशेषताएँ:

मन को भक्ति से भर देने वाली धुन
सुंदर राधा-कृष्ण भाव
आत्मिक शांति और प्रेम का अनुभव

🌸 जय श्री राधे कृष्णा 🙏
📌 Like | Share | Subscribe करें और और भी भक्ति गीत सुनें।


🙏 Teri Murli Ki Dhun Sunne Main Barsane Se Aayi Hoon | Radha Krishna Bhajan 🙏
A soulful devotional song that beautifully expresses Radha Rani’s love and devotion for *Lord Krishna*.
In this bhajan, Radha comes from Barsana to Vrindavan, enchanted by the divine melody of Krishna’s flute.


Heart-touching Krishna bhakti song
Soulful Radha Krishna lyrics
Brings peace, devotion, and divine connection

🌸 Jai Shri Radhe Krishna 🙏
📌 Don’t forget to like, share & subscribe for more beautiful bhajans.


#terimurlikidhun #radhekrishna #radhakrishnasong #radhakrishnabhajan #radhakrishnalove #krishnabhajan #lordkrishna #krishnabhakti #radharani #radhekrishnabhakti #radhekrishnablessings #krishnasong #bhajan #hindubhajan #krishnamusic #radhakrishnadevotion #spiritualsong #radhamadhav #radhekrishnaquotes #radhekrishnastatus #radhekrishnalife #krishnabhaktisong #barsana #vrindavan #iskcon #krishnaconsciousness #radhakrishnabg #krishnabhajanstatus #bhaktisong #hindudevotional #krishnalover #shreekrishna #krishnabhajan2025 #devotionalsong #radhakrishnalovequotes #krishnalove #radhekrishnabhajan2025 #krishnabhakt #radhekrishnawhatsappstatus #spiritualmusic #murlimanohar #murlidhar #krishnakanhaiya #krishnabhaktigeet #radhakrishnakirtan #iskconbhajan #radhekrishnalyrics #hindibhajan #bhaktisongs #krishnabhaktibhajan #krishnabhajansong #devotionalbhajan
